pages.text: $(thing)Drives$() are the core item of the research system. Each drive belongs to a specific tier and can store a limited number of recipe IDs:$(br2)$(li)Unstable: 2 recipes$(li)Reclaimed (Basic): 4 recipes$(li)Enhanced (Advanced): 8 recipes$(li)Elaborate (Precise): 12 recipes$(li)Cybernetic (Flawless): 16 recipes$(li)Self-Aware: unlimited

pages.title: Using Drives
pages.text: When research completes, a recipe ID is $(thing)imprinted$() onto the drive. The drive gains an enchantment glint to show it has recipes.$(br2)Drives $(thing)persist$() after crafting — the recipe stays on the drive so you can craft the same item multiple times.$(br2)Right-click a filled drive in hand to open the $(thing)Drive Inspector$() and see all stored recipes.
